intro: Holosteum klopotovii, also known as Klopotov's cranesbill, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and pain, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Holosteum klopotovii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Holosteum klopotovii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is commonly used to treat conditions such as arthritis, fever, and respiratory infections.
